stem: Choose the correct word: She ___ to school every day.
What is the past tense of "buy"?,buyed|bought|buys|buying,bought,buy 是不规则动词，过去式为 bought。,vocabulary
Choose the correct word: There ___ many people in the park.
explanation: many people 是复数，用 are。

stem: "I have ___ finished my homework." Choose the correct word.,yet|already|still|ever,already,already 用于肯定句中表示"已经"。,grammar
The meaning of "abandon" is closest to:,keep|give up|hold|create,give up,abandon 意为放弃、抛弃。,vocabulary
Translate into English: 我每天早上六点起床。
options: I get up at six o'clock every morning
I wake up at 6 AM every day
answer: I get up at six o'clock every morning.
explanation: 考查一般现在时和日常表达。

stem: Translate into Chinese: Knowledge is power.
answer: 知识就是力量。这是培根的名言。
explanation: 知识就是力量的英文原文翻译为"知识就是力量"。,translation
cleanAnswer: 知识就是力量这是培根的名言

stem: "He is good ___ playing basketball." Choose the correct preposition.,at|in|on|for,at,be good at 是固定搭配，表示擅长某事。,grammar
